depends_on.context: External cross-skill dependency (ADR-005): the shared MCP execution substrate all three modes (mcp-chrome-devtools, mcp-click-up, mcp-figma) reach through the unchanged code_mode MCP registration key. mcp-code-mode is infrastructure serving consumers beyond this hub, not a hub member.

mcp-figma's mandatory cross-hub judgment pairing (ADR-002): apply sk-design's anti-default judgment before any Figma read/export feeds a design decision. Also a sibling overlap -- sk-design's own md-generator mode sources design tokens from live URLs while mcp-figma sources from Figma Desktop, with DESIGN.md output overlap.

enhances.context: Union of all three modes' contributions to sk-code implementation: browser debugging for the WEB stack route (mcp-chrome-devtools), task-management context for development workflows (mcp-click-up), and Figma exports/DESIGN.md/variables/screenshots feeding implementation (mcp-figma).

siblings.context: Cross-hub sibling: mcp-figma reads design context from Figma Desktop while sk-design's md-generator sources from live URLs, with DESIGN.md output overlap.

key_topics: figma-ds-cli binary (and the unrelated figma-cli npm collision)
Figma Desktop session and local daemon
safe (plugin) vs yolo (app.asar patch) connect modes
optional Framelink figma MCP via Code Mode
derived.causal_summary: mcp-tooling is the single public advisor identity for three MCP tool bridges, folded into one parent hub (packet 126-mcp-tooling-parent). mcp-chrome-devtools routes browser-debugging work between the bdg CLI and Code Mode MCP, prioritizing the cheapest effective interface. mcp-click-up routes ClickUp task management between the cupt CLI (daily ops) and the official ClickUp MCP (documents, goals, bulk operations), with agent-safety invariants (dry-run before batch completion, per-list status resolution). mcp-figma drives Figma Desktop from the terminal through figma-ds-cli, gated read-only/mutating/destructive, paired with sk-design for design judgment before any design-affecting operation -- it never decides taste itself. It matters because it gives three previously-flat, independently advisor-routable MCP bridges one coherent identity while preserving each mode's own contract, and mcp-code-mode -- the shared execution substrate all three reach through Code Mode -- stays external infrastructure rather than a dissolved hub member.
